race.name: Kazan Ski Marathon
race.tagline: Fifty kilometers through Tatarstan's Volga forests — where Russia's third capital brings a thousand skiers to the trails each winter.

climate.description: Moderate Russian continental winters along the Volga. February temperatures typically -14°C to -4°C. Snow cover generally reliable but thaw periods possible.
challenges: Midwinter thaw risk near the Volga

course.primary: Rolling course through forested parkland near Kazan along the Volga River banks. Moderate terrain with some river bluff climbs.
course.surface: Groomed trails through river valley forest and parkland
features: Accessible from major city of Kazan
Strong field from Tatarstan's skiing community

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Good accessibility from Kazan and strong community support lift this Russialoppet event. Snow reliability slightly less certain than Siberian venues.

history.summary: The Kazan Ski Marathon is held near Russia's third-largest city, the capital of Tatarstan. Kazan's location on the Volga River and strong sports infrastructure make this one of the more accessible Russialoppet events.
notable_facts: Kazan is often called Russia's third capital after Moscow and St. Petersburg
Tatarstan has invested heavily in winter sports infrastructure
Part of the Russialoppet national marathon series
Volga River valley provides the course setting

youtube_data.search_query: Kazan Ski Marathon cross country ski race Kazan

videos.title: Cross Country Men's relay 4x10km - Winter Universiade Trentino 2013
videos.description:
Ukraine (Kateryna Grygorenko, Maryna Antsybor and Kateryna Serdyuk) and Kazakhstan (Aleksandr Malyshev, Sergey Malyshev, Gennadiy Matvyenko and Mark Starostin) won the gold medals in the cross-country relays at the 26thWinter Universiade Trentino 2013.

At the beginning of the men's 4x10km, the Italian Team with Mauro Brigadoi, Mattia Pellegrin and Mario Roncador, all from Trentino, did a great job, taking the lead. However, at the beginning of the last leg, Russia, with Ermil Vokuey, closed the gap together with Finland and Kazakhstan. 
The Kazakhs prevailed over the Russian team (Pavel Siulatov, Vladislav Skobelev, Ermil Vokuev, Raul Shakirzianov) thanks to Mark Starostin's decisive final sprint. Finland (Heikki Korpela, Perttu Hyvarinen, Jari Huhta, Juha-Matti Mikkolainen) grabbed the bronze medal.

videos.title: Победа Червоткина Алексея и Доценко Анастасии на 50 км. 56-й Казанский лыжный марафон как это было
videos.description:
Всем привет! Сегодня 11.03.2023 на стадионе Локомотив в поселке Юдино г. Казань прошел 56-й Казанский лыжный марафон. Чуть больше 500 участников в забегах на 5, 25 и 50 км.
Среди мужчин на дистанции 50 км победил Олимпийский чемпион 2022 года Червоткин Алексей.  2 место занял Илья Кузнецов и 3. место Владислав Азанов

У женщин на дистанции 50 км  победила призер Этапов Кубка Мира Доценко Анастасия 2. место Бабчина Наталья 3. Алена Перевозчикова

Сам не смог принять участие в данном марафоне, откровенно говоря пока не готов к таким дистанциям. Поэтому решил снять гонку и сделать небольшое видео, где каждый участник данного марафона, возможно сможет себя найти,посмотреть на себя со стороны и посмотреть на потрясающую технику лидеров. Приятного просмотра друзья!

Результаты первая 10-ка:

videos.description: Justyna at the top of the podium and with this victory she takes back the red tds leader bib.

videos.title: Vasaloppet Visma Ski Classics 2019
videos.description:
Vasaloppet started in 1922, but really it is much older than that. The first Vasalopp was carried out as early as 1521 by Gustav Eriksson. During his flight from the Danish king he stopped in Sälen and returned to Mora to lead the uprising against the occupation forces. Gustav Eriksson eventually united the realm and became Sweden’s first king, better known under the name Gustav Vasa. In other words, Sälen is not only the starting point for the world’s largest exercise race; it is also the starting point for the history of our whole country.
#16000человек собрались проехать на лыжах дистанцию в 90км от Салена до Моры #Vasa #vasaloppet #crosscountryski #ski #skimarathon #васалоппет #васалопет #васа #лыжи #лыжныймарафон #visma #vismaskiclassics #🎿 #Sweeden #mora #salen #vasaloppet2019 #worldloppet #skiclassics

videos.title: BigUp Ski Marathon - bland kullar på slätten
videos.description:
Race report från 2026 års upplaga av BigUp Ski Marathon, ett långlopp på Vreta Ski Center. Filmen visar min upplevelse före, under och efter loppet, filmat med kameror fastsatta på mig som ger en Point-Of-View känsla. 

Loppet är seedningsgrundande för Vasaloppet och i år genomfördes det på konstsnöslinga som det kördes 13 varv på. Banan var mestadels relativt flack, men varvet innehöll också en backe på 20 hm som gjorde att STIFA för loppet likväl blev 13 (faktiskt mer än ett genomsnittligt seedningslopp i Sverige idag).

Innehåll: 
00:00 Intro innan start
2:51 Start, första varvet och bangenomgång
4:47 Varv 2-5
10:15 Halvvägs
12:23 Fyra varv kvar
15:20 Målgång
16:21 Vallagenomgång hos Snö och Tö

videos.title: Kazan - sports capital of Russia
videos.description:
Kazan, the capital of sports in Russia, is a place of the union of two major religions and thousands of nationalities. Already 3 years consecutively, Kazan hosts running-fans from all over the world at the Kazan marathon, which traditionally takes place in May. The Kazan marathon route runs through the picturesque places of the city. 
For the citizens of Kazan running is part of their everyday life that is why not only professional athletes but also sport enthusiasts from all over Russia take part in the Kazan marathon. We are preparing for this event all year round. We are waiting for you! Become part of the sport history!
